method: Rendered the rebuilt 22-page PDF with pdftoppm after regenerating figures and tightening reviewer-facing framing around Marchenko-Pastur as a visibility reference, refusal confounds, capability-preservation limits, matched medical-organism scope, SVD-versus-mechanism claims, and retrospective rather than calibrated predictive validation. Verified pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus the changed abstract/intro, spectral, causal, misalignment, appendix-figure, 3D-figure, and discussion pages. Citations, figure labels, tables, and path references are legible and no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects were observed.
